Prover commits to polynomial evaluations via Merkle tree 2. Verifier sends random folding challenges 3. Prover folds polynomial and commits to new evaluations 4. Repeat until polynomial is constant 5. Verifier checks consistency at random query points Security: 128-bit security requires ~80 queries with blowup factor 8","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"FRIVerifier - Level 2 FRI Low-Degree Test Implementation","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Full FRI verification for STARK proofs","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/src/FRIVerifier.sol":"FRIVerifier"},"evmVersion":"shanghai","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":ds-test/=lib/sp1-contracts/contracts/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/sp1-contracts/contracts/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/sp1-contracts/contracts/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":sp1-contracts/=lib/sp1-contracts/contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/src/FRIVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9c64a039f97c98eaeaf3e9e9030e6331ed4a97019468574ae0ccf3b12c3b13d9","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://28d4f8b0e3ea3553056f0f1c7c79863c145279bc0de12cac992a698de8cd8fad","dweb:/ipfs/QmPwAcUgdogKUMTHZM62u5gxvm2hex38petyCxfi7iLmVu"]}},"version":1}
